name: Inspector 2 Industrial Pro Portable Carbon Monoxide Detector
tagline: Industrial-grade CO detection you can trust
personalNote: Needed something I could trust while we were having basement construction.

name: Lavazza Super Crema Whole Bean Coffee
tagline: Medium espresso roast, Arabica and Robusta blend, 2.2 lb bag
personalNote: These beans produce the perfect frothy crema when making flat whites with my espresso machine. Smooth, not too bitter.

name: Uni Kuru Toga Metal Mechanical Pencil
tagline: All-metal body with auto lead rotation, 0.5mm fine point
personalNote: I was tired of flimsy mechanical pencils and wanted something that felt substantial. This one lives on my desk.

name: Raspberry Pi Zero 2 WH
tagline: Quad-core mini computer with pre-soldered header, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth
personalNote: I use this for my animated wizard card project inside a Chocolate Frog Tin. Tiny, powerful enough for what I need.

name: TP-Link TL-SG105 5-Port Gigabit Switch
tagline: Plug-and-play unmanaged network switch, fanless metal design
personalNote: Gave me a wired connection for every device in my office. Plug it in and forget about it.

name: J-B Weld SuperWeld Superglue
personalNote: My go-to super glue for fixing all the kids' broken toys. Strong hold, dries fast.

name: PiSugar 3 Portable Power Board
tagline: Battery power management for Raspberry Pi Zero W/WH
personalNote: The easiest way to battery-power my Raspberry Pi projects. I use it for the animated wizard card and other portable builds.

name: SUNLU AMS Heater for Bambu Lab
tagline: In-place filament dryer for Bambu Lab AMS, heats to 70°C
personalNote: Dries my filament while it sits in the AMS on top of my printer. No more pulling spools out to dry separately.

name: FMS 1/18 Land Cruiser LC80 RC Crawler
tagline: Toyota-licensed 1/18 scale 4WD rock crawler, ready to run
personalNote: Got this for my son Chase's ninth birthday. It's been a blast driving around the dirt and construction in our basement.

name: Statik MagStack Pro USB-C Cable
tagline: Magnetic USB-C charging cable, 100W fast charging, 3ft
personalNote: The magnetic tips keep the cord together when I'm traveling. No more fumbling with wire wraps or tangled cables in my bag.
